mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST ( AUC_SN, PREV_AUC_STATUS_CD, REQ_USR_SN, AUC_CNL_REQ_RSN_CN, AUC_CNL_REQ_REG_ID, AUC_CNL_REQ_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{aucSn}, #{prevAucStatusCd}, #{requesterUsrSn}, #{reason}, #{actor}, #{actor} )
mapper.select: SELECT AUC_CNL_REQ_SN AS cancelRequestSn, AUC_SN AS auctionId, PREV_AUC_STATUS_CD AS previousAuctionStatusCode, AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN AS approvalYn FROM AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST WHERE AUC_CNL_REQ_SN = #{cancelRequestSn} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE AUCTION_CANCEL_REQUEST SET AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN = #{approvalYn}, PROC_USR_SN = #{adminUserId}, AUC_CNL_REQ_PROC_RSN_CN = #{processReason}, AUC_CNL_REQ_PROC_DT = NOW(), AUC_CNL_REQ_UPDT_ID = #{actor}, AUC_CNL_REQ_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE AUC_CNL_REQ_SN = #{cancelRequestSn} AND AUC_CNL_REQ_APRV_YN IS NULL
